# ✂️ Tailor Management System

A modern web-based Tailor Management System built using **Python, Flask, HTML, CSS, and SQLite**. This application helps tailor shops efficiently manage customer information and clothing measurements in a simple and organized way.

---

## 🚀 Features

### 👤 Customer Management

* Add new customers
* Store customer contact details
* Auto-generated bill/customer records

### 👔 Shirt Measurements

* Length
* Shoulder
* Sleeve
* Chest
* Stomach
* Hip
* Collar

### 👖 Pant Measurements

* Length
* Waist
* Hip
* Thigh
* Knee
* Bottom
* Fork

### 🔍 Search Functionality

* Search customers using Bill Number
* Search customers using Phone Number
* Instant measurement retrieval

### ✏️ Edit & Update

* Update customer measurements anytime
* Modify shirt and pant measurements separately

### 🗑️ Delete Records

* Remove customer records safely
* Confirmation before deletion

### 🎨 Modern User Interface

* Professional dashboard layout
* Colorful navigation buttons
* Responsive measurement cards
* Clean and user-friendly design

---

## 🛠️ Technologies Used

* Python
* Flask
* HTML5
* CSS3
* SQLite
* Jinja2 Templates
* Git & GitHub

## ⚙️ Installation

### Clone the Repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/hemanthrajkumarar2007/tailor-management-system.git
```

### Move into Project Directory

```bash
cd tailor-management-system
```

### Install Flask

```bash
pip install flask
```

### Run the Application

```bash
python app.py
```

### Open Browser

```text
http://127.0.0.1:5001
```
